'''Tar Monevv''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] born aboard a [[Koros-Strohna]] Worldship, and a member of the [[warrior caste]]. Holding the rank of [[Commander/Legends|commander]], Monevv was an advance agent sent to destabilize enemy governments in advance for the Yuuzhan Vong to better conquer. Monevv hoped to one day [[Escalation|escalate]] to the Yuuzhan Vong rank of [[warmaster]], and his career gave evidence that this goal was not unreasonable.

==Biography==
Tar Monevv was born in the [[warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to an extra-galactic galaxy which had been devastated by a [[Silentium–Abominor War|conflict]] between two droid species. Like all the other warriors, Monevv was trained from birth to excel in combat and show exceptional ferocity. A skilled fighter, he was eventually made a [[Commander/Legends|commander]], making him a high-ranking [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the Yuuzhan Vong army.<ref name="UA" />

When his people decided to conquer [[The galaxy/Legends|another galaxy]] to made it their new home, Monevv served as an agent provocateur whose role was to undermine the government of [[Planet/Legends|planet]] marked for conquest through acts of sabotage and espionage. He would regularly report to his [[Supreme Commander]] on a targeted world's population, government and military readiness.<ref name="UA" />
